description: An enterprise-grade, accessibility-first global plugin engineered by Accessible Tech Labs India. Designed for visually impaired professionals, this Version 2.0 major release transforms NVDA into the ultimate high-performance workstation assistant. Featuring 10 highly optimized utilities including an Auto-Cleanup Subsystem, Pomodoro Focus Stopwatch, Advanced Sentinel Security Scanner, Voice-Assisted Alarms, Smart Workspace Launcher, and seamless Google Quick Search. The ATL Suite delivers unparalleled speed, security, and digital inclusion directly through your screen reader environment.
changelog: Major Update V2.0: Introduced Auto-Cleanup Subsystem, Pomodoro Focus Mode, Voice-Assisted (TTS) Alarms, Smart Workspace Launcher, and Advanced Power Warnings. Streamlined the suite to 10 highly optimized, crash-free tools with flawless NVDA integration.
